explanations.explanation:
Family FAM_A, I'm so excited to share the changes we've made to your itinerary. We've taken into account the metro strike starting tomorrow and made some adjustments to ensure you have an amazing time in Delhi.

On Day 1, we've added a fantastic spot that matches your interests perfectly - Chandni Chowk. You'll love exploring this bustling market, and it's a great fit for your family. For an extra cost of only 285 INR, you'll get to experience the sights, sounds, and flavors of this iconic place.

We've also removed two attractions that, although nice, didn't quite fit your preferences as well as others. Agrasen ki Baoli and Lodhi Gardens were great options, but we found other places that would give you an even better experience. By removing these, we're saving you 210.52 INR, which you can now use for other fun activities.

On Day 2, we've added Barbeque Nation, a highly recommended spot that fits perfectly into your schedule. You'll enjoy a delicious meal with your family, and it's a great way to spend quality time together. This will add 595.23 INR to your expenses, but trust us, it's worth it.

Lastly, on Day 3, we've removed Social and India Gate due to the metro strike and historical site restrictions, respectively. We've optimized your route to ensure a smooth travel experience, and you'll save 651 INR in the process.

We're confident that these changes will make your trip even more enjoyable and memorable. We've taken care of the details to ensure you have an amazing time in Delhi.
